title: baldellia ranunculoides var. repens
intro: Baldellia ranunculoides var. repens, also known as Lesser Water-plantain, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Alismataceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of health issues due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of Baldellia ranunculoides var. repens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, poultices, and salves for topical application.
